mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( member_id, type, reference_id, message ) SELECT #{memberId}, 'CHAT', #{chatRoomId}, LEFT(#{message}, 255) FROM chat_room_members WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND notifications_enabled = 1 AND is_hidden = 0 LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO notifications ( member_id, type, reference_id, message ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, 'REPORT', #{reportId}, LEFT(#{message}, 255) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, type, reference_id AS referenceId, message, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM notifications WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, notification_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
